mapper.select: SELECT sa.id, sa.scene_id, sa.agent_id, sa.is_default, sa.sort_order, sa.created_at, ag.name AS agent_name, ag.code AS agent_code FROM ai_scene_agent sa LEFT JOIN ai_agent ag ON sa.agent_id = ag.id WHERE sa.scene_id = #{sceneId} ORDER BY sa.sort_order ASC, sa.created_at ASC

SELECT sa.id, sa.scene_id, sa.agent_id, sa.is_default, sa.sort_order, sa.created_at, ag.name AS agent_name, ag.code AS agent_code FROM ai_scene_agent sa LEFT JOIN ai_agent ag ON sa.agent_id = ag.id WHERE sa.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_scene_agent WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_scene_agent (scene_id, agent_id, is_default, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{agentId}, #{isDefault}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
